description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass, featuring large windows and sliding doors throughout. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, some cantilevered, with a mix of white, gray, and wooden exterior finishes. A rooftop garden is visible, adding greenery to the upper level, while the ground floor includes a spacious deck area with an outdoor pool and seating. The house is surrounded by landscaped elements, including several trees and a paved driveway leading to a covered carport. The main entryway is accentuated by a set of steps and a prominent overhang, providing a sheltered entrance. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and strong connections between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a rooftop garden, and a spacious outdoor deck with a pool. The exterior features a mix of white, gray, and wood finishes, surrounded by landscaped trees and a carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, carport, and large glass windows with a central tree and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor deck, pool, and seating area, as well as the stairway leading to the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cantilevered sections, rooftop garden, and extensive use of glass on both stories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the deck, pool, and the integration of greenery with the house's modern lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a prominent overhang, and large glass doors, flanked by landscaped elements.
